_purpose: Canonical index of all scripts and tools available in the analysis-tool + green-ai workspace. Consult this FIRST before searching for tools or asking the user. Updated whenever a script is added, removed, or changed.
_rule: AI agents must read this file before concluding a tool does not exist.

tools.name: Create-Audit-Package.ps1
tools.purpose: Creates a combined audit ZIP of analysis-tool and green-ai for external review. Excludes binaries, obj/bin, .git. Generates PACKAGE_INDEX.md and PACKAGE_MANIFEST.json inside the ZIP.

tools.name: set_copilot_env.ps1
tools.purpose: Sets GITHUB_TOKEN and DOMAIN_ENGINE_AI_PROVIDER env vars before running Python AI enrichment scripts.
tools.warning: SECURITY: Do NOT store real tokens in this file. Use environment variables or a secrets manager instead. File contained a plaintext PAT — revoke and replace with placeholder.

tools.name: Validate-Audit-Package.ps1
tools.purpose: Validates an audit package ZIP against AUDIT_PACKAGE_PROTOCOL.md rules. Checks project roots, required generated files (PACKAGE_INDEX.md, PACKAGE_MANIFEST.json), forbidden extensions, and forbidden folders.

tools.name: Generate-ChatGPT-Package.ps1
tools.purpose: Generates a ZIP package (ChatGPT-Package.zip) for the Architect (ChatGPT). Includes Layer 1 (analysis-tool domains + docs) and Layer 2 (green-ai complete). Auto-generates PACKAGE_TOKEN, STATE_SUMMARY.md, DOMAIN_OVERVIEW.md, README.md inside ZIP. Updates token in temp.md.
tools.notes: Run from c:\Udvikling\analysis-tool. Non-fatal: .dbmdl/.jfm files may be locked by SQL Server.

tools.name: run_dfep.py
tools.purpose: DFEP v1 — Domain Functional Equivalence Protocol. Pure deterministic regex-based comparison of sms-service (Level 0) vs green-ai capabilities. Generates gap reports to analysis/dfep/{domain}.md.
tools.notes: Pure regex — no LLM. Use dfep_v2 for AI-powered analysis.

tools.name: dfep_v2.engine.dfep_runner
tools.purpose: DFEP v2 — Hybrid Deterministic + LLM analysis engine. Layer 1: extracts code facts from sms-service + green-ai. Layer 2: LLM (gpt-4.1) converts facts to capabilities and compares by intent. Layer 3: anti-hallucination validation. Generates versioned reports to analysis/dfep/{domain}_{date}.md.
tools.requires: GITHUB_TOKEN env var (or --stub for no-LLM mode)
tools.notes: Set GITHUB_TOKEN before running. --stub mode for structure testing without LLM.

tools.name: dfep_v3.engine.dfep_runner
tools.purpose: DFEP v3 — Copilot-Native two-phase pipeline (governance compliant). Phase 1: deterministic extractor generates structured prompt .md files with embedded code facts. Phase 2: Copilot reads prompts, writes JSON responses → DFEP parses + validates + reports. NO external LLM — Copilot is the only AI brain.
tools.requires: Nothing — no API keys, no tokens
tools.notes: Two-mode workflow: 1) generate-prompts (Copilot reads + writes JSON), 2) parse-response (DFEP validates + reports). Replaces dfep-v2 as primary DFEP engine.
